title: To Have and Have Not
description: This 1936 novel tells the story of an American fishing boat skipper who dabbles in a little smuggling to make ends meet. In need of money for his family the captain reluctantly becomes agrees to smuggle a group of Chinese immigrants from Cuba to Florida. This is Hemingway’s only novel to be set in the United States.
subjects: American fiction (fictional works by one author)
To have and have not (Hemingway, Ernest)
